title: Fern MCP Tool Invocation
description: Schema describing a Model Context Protocol tool call exposed by the Fern MCP server (e.g. ask_fern_ai).

tool.description: Name of the MCP tool to invoke.

query.description: Natural-language question routed to the Ask Fern AI knowledge base.

docsSite.description: Optional Fern docs site slug to scope the query.

transport.description: MCP transport used by the calling client.
